heading: Call from the App Services CLI
body:
You can call a Function through the App Services CLI with the
[function run](atlas/app-services/cli/appservices-function-run) command. The command returns the
Function result as EJSON as well as any log or error messages.

```sh
appservices function run \
  --name=sum \
  --args=1 --args=2
```

By default, Functions run in the [system functions](atlas-system-functions). To call a Function in the context of a specific
user, include their User ID in the `--user` argument.

```sh
appservices function run \
  --name=sum \
  --args=1 --args=2 \
  --user=61a50d82532cbd0de95c7c89
```
